title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repo: get up and running with Llama 2, Mistral, Gemma, and other large language models locally.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client for Ollama; chat, embed, pull, and manage models with a few lines of code.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Node and browsers; stream chats or pull models from npm.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration to use any Ollama model as an LLM or chat backend.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Feature-rich web UI for Ollama (chat UI, model manager, multi-user, dark mode).

title: ollama-cli
summary: Interactive CLI wrapper with readline history, syntax highlighting, and prompt templates.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: GitHub Copilot-style VS-Code extension that uses local Ollama models for inline suggestions.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Minimal retrieval-augmented generation example with Chroma and Ollama embeddings.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client for Ollama; Spring Boot starters included.

title: ollama-discord
summary: Self-host Discord bot that chats or images via Ollama slash commands.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Production-ready Helm chart for deploying Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU support.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack 2.0 integration to use Ollama models as generators or embedders.

title: ollama-nestjs
summary: NestJS module providing decorators and services to inject Ollama clients.

title: ollama-dagger
summary: Dagger module that caches and serves Ollama models inside CI pipelines.

title: ollama-rust
summary: Async Rust client crate for Ollama with tokio and serde support.

title: ollama-csharp
summary: .NET SDK for Ollama with chat, embed, and model management APIs.

title: ollama-obsidian
summary: Obsidian plugin that adds Ollama-powered AI commands inside notes.

title: ollama-slack
summary: Slack Bolt app that brings local LLM chat into your workspace threads.
